title: TURF: anchored ladder
summary: Build the anchored ladder from anchor size 5 in both directions.
oce_text:
[["maxdiff-turf::search-ladder"]]
utilities = "./utilities.csv"
out_dir = "./runs/search-ladder"
anchor_k = 5
reach_method = "first-choice"
ladder_mode = "repair"
direction = "both"
non_utility_cols = "1,2"

title: TURF: ladder with refinement
summary: Anchor at 6, then refine sizes 4 and 5 with sampled search.
oce_text:
[["maxdiff-turf::search-ladder"]]
utilities = "./utilities.csv"
out_dir = "./runs/search-ladder-refine"
anchor_k = 6
reach_method = "first-choice"
ladder_mode = "repair"
refine_sizes = [4, 5]
refine_method = "sampled"
non_utility_cols = "1,2"
